name: Backed GOVIES 0-6 Months Euro Investment Grade
fullName: Backed GOVIES 0-6 Months Euro Investment Grade (bC3M)
description: bC3M is a Backed Assets tracker certificate issued as an ERC-20 token. It tracks the Amundi ETF GOVIES 0-6 Months EUROMTS Investment Grade UCITS ETF, whose underlying index measures short-term Eurozone government bills with 0–6 month maturity. Backed states bTokens are closed to new issuance, while redemption remains supported for existing holders.
subcategory: Tokenized Eurozone Government Bill ETF Tracker Certificate
